title: (Bullish Signal) EBS, entered Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Jun 01, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that EBS's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 89 similar cases where EBS's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 72 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 81%. Current price $61.70 crossed the support line at $68.42 and is trading between $68.42 support and $56.51 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/29/21 - 06/01/21, the price experienced a -2% Downtrend, while the week of 05/24/21 - 06/01/21 shows a +9% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/ldnmgioypv271.png?width=1519&format=png&auto=webp&s=37b8650b868f24709259b2e22bf143e4463ca35e

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 39 of 46 cases where EBS's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on June 01, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on EBS as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 72 of 89 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for EBS just turned positive on May 03, 2021. Looking at past instances where EBS's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 33 of 47 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 70%.

Following a +6.82% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where EBS advanced for three days, in 261 of 334 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

EBS may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
